assignment_unit_requires_module_check.name: assignment_unit_requires_module_check
assignment_unit_requires_module_check.value: "assignment"."unit_id" IS NULL OR "assignment"."module_id" IS NOT NULL

assignment_override_availability_window_.name: assignment_override_availability_window_check
assignment_override_availability_window_.value: "assignment_override"."opens_at" IS NULL OR "assignment_override"."closes_at" IS NULL OR "assignment_override"."closes_at" > "assignment_override"."opens_at"

consent_lifecycle_state_check.name: consent_lifecycle_state_check
consent_lifecycle_state_check.value:
(
        ("consent"."state" = 'granted' AND "consent"."granted_by" IS NOT NULL AND "consent"."granted_at" IS NOT NULL AND "consent"."revoked_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("consent"."state" = 'revoked' AND "consent"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL)
        OR ("consent"."state" = 'pending' AND "consent"."granted_by" IS NULL AND "consent"."granted_at" IS NULL AND "consent"."revoked_at" IS NULL)
        OR ("consent"."state" = 'expired' AND "consent"."expires_at" IS NOT NULL AND "consent"."revoked_at" IS NULL)
      )

course_resource_unit_requires_module_che.name: course_resource_unit_requires_module_check
course_resource_unit_requires_module_che.value: "course_resource"."unit_id" IS NULL OR "course_resource"."module_id" IS NOT NULL

learning_objective_mastery_score_pair_ch.name: learning_objective_mastery_score_pair_check
learning_objective_mastery_score_pair_ch.value: (("learning_objective_mastery"."score" IS NULL AND "learning_objective_mastery"."max_score" IS NULL) OR ("learning_objective_mastery"."score" IS NOT NULL AND "learning_objective_mastery"."max_score" IS NOT NULL))

learning_objective_mastery_score_finite_.name: learning_objective_mastery_score_finite_check
learning_objective_mastery_score_finite_.value: ("learning_objective_mastery"."score" IS NULL OR "learning_objective_mastery"."score"::text NOT IN ('NaN', 'Infinity', '-Infinity')) AND ("learning_objective_mastery"."max_score" IS NULL OR "learning_objective_mastery"."max_score"::text NOT IN ('NaN', 'Infinity', '-Infinity'))

discussion_topic_unit_requires_module_ch.name: discussion_topic_unit_requires_module_check
discussion_topic_unit_requires_module_ch.value: "discussion_topic"."unit_id" IS NULL OR "discussion_topic"."module_id" IS NOT NULL

quiz_unit_requires_module_check.name: quiz_unit_requires_module_check
quiz_unit_requires_module_check.value: "quiz"."unit_id" IS NULL OR "quiz"."module_id" IS NOT NULL
